title: Lobotomy DP
description: Datapack that adds a little bit of afterimage of lobotomy :3
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e50535d88602009821b60c973a1332db34b36644.png)
# Was inspired by memes and [Yahimouse](https://www.youtube.com/@YahiamiceLIVE)'s [𝐖](https://youtu.be/zWtOsn-mV8I) and [𝐌](https://youtu.be/DULJPtZCcVA)
### This datapack was created for my video to play with friends. Order datapack / other - [Discord](https://discord.gg/dCWyMsE94D).
This datapack was intended to add a lot of weird stuff to curse your world.
Download and play at your own risk.

It's also better to download the [Modify Player Data](https://modrinth.com/mod/modify-player-data) mod, without this mod some abilities will not be available.

<details>
<summary>FAQ about mod:</summary>
  
**Q: Where should I download the mod?**

**A:** If you are playing with friends LAN, **only hosting player** needs to download. If you play on a server, then **only in the server folder**. It's okay if someone also has a mod.

**Q: What are the "some abilities"?**

**A:** This mod allows you to modify the player's NBT data, and the most important thing is **Motion**.

**Q: What about other alternatives from Minecraft itself?**

**A:** I was shaking my mouth at these alternatives. You can simply push the player only by levitation or invisible slimes, which cannot be normally invisible if summoned for a moment. And in any case, I made this datapack without worrying about optimization, further use after video or about other users, so I think you can accept it.
  
</details>

### Resource pack in datapack version! Don't forget to download it (Optifine not required)

# Video (ru):
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/943GY46PFBQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Some commands:
```
Start game - /function erkatom:start_game
Undo game start - /function erkatom:unstart_game
Give lootbox - /loot give <nickname> loot erkatom:custom/box
```

<details>
<summary>FAQ:</summary>
  
**Q: Can you add a translation option?**

**A:** Only if you ask very nicely or better [pay](https://www.donationalerts.com/r/erkatom).

**Q: Can you update datapack to [version]?**

**A:** Hell no. If this version is lower than 1.21.2 100% no, but if higher, then datapack may still work, but I don’t want to deal with it's further support, either I’ll make a new update for the new video, or I won’t touch it anymore.

**Q: Who did the graphic design?**

**A:** I made almost all the textures and models either myself or using [Craftbench AI](https://discord.gg/craftbench), but special thanks to my friend [Just A Player](https://www.youtube.com/@just_a_normal_player) for the gun model.

**Q: Why lobotomy?**

**A:** Funny.

**Q: It seems to me or did you completely steal some functions from [Yahi](https://www.youtube.com/@YahiamiceLIVE)?**

**A:** Uhh next question.

**Q: I didn't understand the point of [this].**

**A:** Most jokes are either local or for a Russian audience.
  
</details>
